title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
